subcodes.first_line: I call out in prayer and seek relief for humanity, yet people themselves become the cause of constriction, like [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من دعا میکنم و از برای خلق گشایش می طلبم اما خلق خودشان سبب تنگی میشوند مثل
subcodes.subjects: @episodes from the early history of Islam, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @universal peace; world unity
